TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == satangahan : == alupal u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam a kamu:柿 nu Amilika a kamu:persimmon nu Zipun a kamu:柿 u canan ku alupal a sanek cupelak ku alupal nu Taywan. . namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ː 柿 persimmon == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ː ==
S.PHON: == sataŋaħan : == ar~ɾupar~ɾ u zuma a kamu : nu ħur~ɾam a kamu:* nu amir~ɾika a kamu:pərsimmon nu zipun a kamu:* u ʦanan ku ar~ɾupar~ɾ a sanək ʦupər~ɾak ku ar~ɾupar~ɾ nu tajwan. . namakajniaj a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuan atu natinəŋan * * pərsimmon == mar~ɾaar~ɾitin tu i ħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan * ==
S.FORM: == satangahan : == alupal u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam a kamu:柿 nu Amilika a kamu:persimmon nu Zipun a kamu:柿 u canan ku alupal a sanek cupelak ku alupal nu Taywan. . namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ː 柿 persimmon == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ː ==
S.PHON: == sataŋaħan : == ar~ɾupar~ɾ u zuma a kamu : nu ħur~ɾam a kamu:* nu amir~ɾika a kamu:pərsimmon nu zipun a kamu:* u ʦanan ku ar~ɾupar~ɾ a sanək ʦupər~ɾak ku ar~ɾupar~ɾ nu tajwan. . namakajniaj a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuan atu natinəŋan * * pərsimmon == mar~ɾaar~ɾitin tu i ħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan * ==
